      upval_0[r0_104] = r1_104
      return

local r18_1 = function(r0_18)
  -- line: [0, 0] id: 18

  end
  if r0_18.Hub.Animation then
  end
  if r0_18.Key.KeySystem then
  end
  if r0_18.Key.Title then
  end
  if r0_18.Key.Description then
  end
  if r0_18.Key.Keys then
  end
  if r0_18.Key.KeyLink then
  end
  if r0_18.Key.Notifi.Notifications then
  end
  if r0_18.Key.Notifi.Incorrectkey then
  end
  if r0_18.Key.Notifi.CorrectKey then
  end
  if r0_18.Key.Notifi.CopyKeyLink then
  end
  if not false then
    local r16_18 = UDim2.new(0, 400, 0, 220)
    r16_18 = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)
    r16_18 = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
    local r12_18 = upval_0("Frame", upval_1, {
      Size = r16_18,
      Position = r16_18,

      Active = true,
      Draggable = true,
    })
    upval_3(r12_18)

    r17_18 = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 5)
    r17_18 = Vector2.new(1, 0)
    r17_18 = Color3.fromRGB(200, 200, 200)
    local r13_18 = upval_0("TextButton", r12_18, {
      Size = r17_18,
      Position = r17_18,
      AnchorPoint = r17_18,
      Text = "X",
      Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne,
      TextScaled = true,
      TextColor3 = r17_18,
      BackgroundTransparency = 1,
    })
    upval_3(r13_18)
    local r18_18 = UDim2.new(1, -80, 0, 20)
    r18_18 = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 5)
    local r14_18 = upval_0("TextLabel", r12_18, {
      Size = r18_18,
      Position = r18_18,
      Text = "Key System",
      Font = upval_2.Text_Font,
      TextScaled = true,
      TextColor3 = upval_2.Cor_Text,
      TextXAlignment = "Left",
      BackgroundTransparency = 1,

    local r19_18 = UDim2.new(1, -80, 0, 0)
    r19_18 = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 25)
    local r15_18 = upval_0("TextLabel", r12_18, {
      Size = r19_18,

            upval_3(upval_6, "ImageTransparency", 0, 0.3, false)
          end
          return
    end

    upval_10 = false

  end

  function SetImage(r0_99, r1_99)

  local r29_18 = function(r0_44, r1_44)

  local r29_18 = function(r0_57, r1_57)

    r11_57 = UDim2.new(0, 60, 0, 25)

      TextXAlignment = "Left",

      TextColor3 = r11_57,

    r13_57 = Vector2.new(0.5, 1)
    r13_57 = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 1, -8)
    r13_57 = Color3.fromRGB(220, 220, 220)
    r13_57 = Color3.fromRGB(50, 200, 50)
    r9_57 = upval_0("TextButton", r5_57, {
      Size = r13_57,
      AnchorPoint = r13_57,
      Position = r13_57,
      Text = "Copy",
      Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold,
      TextSize = 15,
      TextColor3 = r13_57,
      BackgroundColor3 = r13_57,

    upval_2(r9_57)
    r10_57 = tick()
    ClickConter = 0
    local r13_57 = function()
      -- line: [0, 0] id: 58
      upval_0()
      if ClickConter ~= 0 then
        local r0_58 = tick()
        if 5 < r0_58 - upval_1 then
        end
        r0_58 = tick()
        upval_1 = r0_58
        setclipboard(upval_2)
        ClickConter = ClickConter + 1
        upval_3.Text = "Copied to Clipboard"
        local r1_58 = Color3.fromRGB(100, 100, 100)
        upval_3.BackgroundColor3 = r1_58
        r1_58 = Color3.fromRGB(150, 150, 150)
        upval_3.TextColor3 = r1_58
        task.wait(5)
        upval_3.Text = "Copy"
        r1_58 = Color3.fromRGB(50, 200, 50)
        upval_3.BackgroundColor3 = r1_58
        r1_58 = Color3.fromRGB(220, 220, 220)
        upval_3.TextColor3 = r1_58
      end
      return
    end
    r9_57.MouseButton1Click:Connect(r13_57)
    return
  end
